_comment: Latch-up fixture: n+ (nsdm) inside nwell, p+ (psdm) outside nwell, 0.5 µm apart. All coordinates in µm.

nsdm._comment: n+ region inside nwell. Right edge at x=9.5, centroid at (8.0, 5.0).

psdm._comment: p+ region outside nwell. Left edge at x=10.0 (nwell right boundary). Gap between nsdm right edge (9.5) and psdm left edge (10.0) = 0.5 µm < 0.84 µm threshold.

tap._comment: Tap inside the nwell — satisfies the well-tap rule. Centroid at (2,2), distance from nwell centroid (5,5) ≈ 4.24 µm < 15 µm.
